title: Noverplay
description:
NoverPlay is a client-side Fabric mod that adds a full-featured music player directly into Minecraft.
You can search for tracks on YouTube and control playback, queue, and volume through a clean built-in GUI — without ever leaving the game.
body:
NoverPlay is a client-side Fabric mod that brings a complete music player directly into Minecraft.

## Features
With NoverPlay, you can:

- Search for tracks on YouTube  
- Play music without leaving the game  
- Manage playback controls (play/pause/skip)  
- Add songs to a queue  
- Adjust volume through an in-game interface  

The mod features a clean and user-friendly built-in GUI, allowing you to enjoy music while playing seamlessly.

## Important Notes
- Client-side only (not required on servers)  
- Designed for the Fabric modloader  
- Requires an internet connection for YouTube search and playback
